name: first-use-of-day check triggers an automatic refresh when the last fetch was before today
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch fixtures && printf '2026-05-12T20:00:00Z\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch/cfpb.txt && printf '{"number":1,"merged":true}\n' > fixtures/prs.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/first-use-check.sh" --source cfpb --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z --upstream-stub fixtures/prs.jsonl 2>out.txt && grep -q 'auto_refresh=triggered' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
